category_sources: source_facts.description says simple-obfs is a Shadowsocks obfuscating plugin; official README describes it as a simple obfuscating tool and Shadowsocks plugin.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub README use the name simple-obfs.
docs_sources: No dedicated docs site found; official GitHub README provides build and usage documentation, including plugin and standalone modes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/shadowsocks/simple-obfs; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official README describe obfs-local/obfs-server for Shadowsocks traffic obfuscation and note deprecation.
